title: sophora velutina var. multifoliolata
intro: Sophora velutina var. multifoliolata, also known as Korean sandalwood or Korean Sophora, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Sophora velutina var. multifoliolata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exert antiviral and antifungal effects. Sophora velutina var. multifoliolata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
